description: Claude Hangar MCP Server Registry — catalog of all supported MCP servers

sequential-thinking.name: Sequential Thinking
sequential-thinking.description: Structured step-by-step reasoning for complex problems

context7.name: Context7
context7.description: Live documentation lookup for any library or framework

github.name: GitHub
github.description: GitHub repos, PRs, issues, code search
github.note: Remote HTTP server with OAuth — no local install needed. Alternative: Go binary from github/github-mcp-server

postgres.name: PostgreSQL (DBHub)
postgres.description: Database schema inspection, queries, performance analysis
postgres.note: Replaced @crystaldba/postgres-mcp (npm package unavailable). DBHub supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite via DSN.

snyk.name: Snyk
snyk.description: Security scanning for dependencies, code, IaC, and containers

notion.name: Notion
notion.description: Access and manage Notion workspaces — search, create/update pages and databases
notion.note: Remote HTTP server with OAuth — no local install needed. Official Notion-hosted server.

sentry.name: Sentry
sentry.description: AI-powered error debugging — query issues, traces, replays, and release data
sentry.note: Remote HTTP server with OAuth — zero local install required.

stripe.name: Stripe
stripe.description: Payment lifecycle management — customers, products, invoices, subscriptions, refunds
stripe.note: Remote HTTP server with OAuth. Also supports API key for local mode (@stripe/mcp).

linear.name: Linear
linear.description: Project management — find, create, update issues, projects, initiatives in Linear
linear.note: Remote HTTP server with OAuth 2.1. Also supports API key via Bearer token header.
